游戏.title: Storage Wars Star Darrell Sheets Dies Aged 67
游戏.summary: Darrell Sheets, one of the stars of the hit A&E reality series Storage Wars, has died at age 67. Sheets passed away on Wednesday, April 22 in Lake Havasu City, Arizona. Local police have since released information on how the reality TV personality died.
